root_causes: Outlook changed the row text after marking it read, so the in-memory fingerprint changed and the same row was opened a second time before the search DOM refreshed.
The V4.7.0.3 gate counted any MISSING= token as an error, including MISSING=(none) on COMPLETE=true rows.
fixes: Add refreshed post-read row fingerprint to processedRows
Gate only counts COMPLETE=false or OUTLOOK_EMAIL_LEFT_UNREAD
